name: Leger & Shaw
message: Leger & Shaw is a New Orleans-based law firm established in 1979, specializing in maritime and admiralty law, class actions, complex litigation, commercial litigation, and serious personal injury claims. The firm is committed to providing personal service and effectively advocating for clients' rights throughout their legal journeys. Known for handling high-profile and complex cases, Leger & Shaw has recovered substantial settlements for clients affected by significant incidents such as the BP Oil Spill. Their contingency fee arrangement allows clients to seek legal representation without upfront costs, ensuring access to experienced legal services
